Explicitly defined and checked in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
Explicitly defined in setup_task.sh as SOURCE_ORK.
verifier.py is entirely missing from the task directory, so the pass_threshold cannot be verified programmatically.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real OpenRocket example design 'Dual parachute deployment' (a CAD model of the physical 'Hickory Dickory Mach' rocket). All path parameters, source constraints, and exact numerical thresholds (3.0m launch rod, 15.0 m/s minimum clearance velocity, and 1200.0m max altitude) were confirmed against the setup scripts and explicit task instructions. However, the task directory is missing the verifier.py script, so the pass_threshold of 80 cannot be verified or enforced programmatically.
